privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic dataset. Four PDF protocol files (Brain_SRS_Protocol_v3.0.pdf, HeadNeck_IMRT_Protocol_v1.2.pdf, Lung_SBRT_Protocol_v2.1.pdf, Prostate_VMAT_Protocol_v4.5.pdf) are created as empty placeholder files via the 'touch' command in the setup_task.sh script at /opt/hospital/protocols. The Eclipse project 'TreatmentPlanner' is set up at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/TreatmentPlanner. All metadata values match the setup script configuration exactly: project path, external data path, linked resource name ('protocols'), and expected output file ('protocol_index.txt'). The data is created programmatically by the pre-task setup hook, not sourced from external data sources.
